report.technique: Pelvic MRI at 3T including T2W, T1W, DWI, and dynamic contrast-enhanced sequences.
report.findings: Uterus: normal. Cervix: normal. Right adnexa: 45 mm complex cystic-solid lesion with enhancing mural nodule on the right. Bladder: normal. Bowel: normal. Bones: no aggressive lesion.
report.impression:
1. 45 mm left adnexal complex cystic-solid lesion with enhancing mural nodule, suspicious.
2. Multidisciplinary review recommended.
